question: What should you do when you and another vehicle arrive at an intersection at the same time?

answers.text: You must yield to the vehicle on your right.

question: What is the only effective way to lower your blood alcohol concentration (BAC)?

question: On a highway, why is it important to look further ahead than when driving in the city?

question: Which of these actions should be avoided during overtaking?
